# Shashank Shukla

I build things and dump thoughts here. Backend systems, markets, and why people do what they do.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/)
- [Projects](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/projects/) - Features Xinsight AI (Chrome extension) and TRADEiLOG.
- [All Posts](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/blogs/) - Archive of all articles.

## Articles
- [Understanding Palantir](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/blogs/understanding-palantir/): An investigative history of Palantir Technologies, exploring how strategy, product design, procurement, litigation, and governance shaped one of the world's most unconventional software companies.
- [A Thought Experiment Gone Too Far](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/blogs/thought-exp-gone-too-far/): A curiosity-driven exploration of perception, consciousness, neuroscience, AI, and why Bharatiya philosophical traditions deserve more recognition in discussions of reality.
- [Finished Reading The Godfather. Then I Looked Around.](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/blogs/godfather-novel/): Reflections after reading The Godfather: power, influence, tribalism, politics, and the hidden patterns that shape human behavior and institutions.
- [Finished My First Novel in One Sitting](https://itzsshashank.github.io/shashankshukla/blogs/reading-novel/): Thoughts on reading Around the World in Eighty Days in a single sitting.
